---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for CZOI Toolkit
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution
Describe the API/CLI/behavior. Include examples.

## Alternatives considered
What alternatives/workarounds did you consider and why are they insufficient?

## Scope & impact
- Affected modules (check all that apply):
  - [ ] `czoi.core`
  - [ ] `czoi.permission`
  - [ ] `czoi.constraint`
  - [ ] `czoi.neural`
  - [ ] `czoi.embedding`
  - [ ] `czoi.daemon`
  - [ ] `czoi.simulation`
  - [ ] `czoi.integrations` (Django/Flask/FastAPI)
  - [ ] `czoi.cli`
  - [ ] `czoi.storage`
  - [ ] `czoi.utils`

## Security & performance considerations
Does this change affect `safe_eval`, permission calculus, or daemon execution? Any notable performance/memory impacts?

## Additional context
Add any other relevant context or sketches.

> Please read the ../../CONTRIBUTING.md and reference sections of the codebase where applicable.
